document_id: 3.5 NC ESG Third Party Verification of Client's Income 2021.v1.pdf

findings.description: Multi-column layout for checkboxes collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the checkboxes under 'CHECK ONE:' are arranged in three distinct columns. In the HTML, they are rendered as a single vertical column.

findings.description: Redundant bullet points added to checkbox list.
findings.evidence: The HTML renders the 'CHECK ONE:' options as an unordered list, adding a bullet point before each checkbox character, which does not exist in the original PDF.
